# Snack Night LLC

## About Us
Snack Night LLC is a film production company operating out of Arlington, VA 
(Washington D.C. Metro Area) and wherever we find stories or snacks. 
We specialize in a wide range of video production services, including:
* Music Videos
* Short Documentaries
* Narrative Films
* Branded Content & Commercials
* Corporate Video Production
* Interviews & Talking Heads
* Event Coverage
* Promotional & Social Media Content

## Our Philosophy
We approach storytelling with a little flavor and a lot of intention. 
Our work is grounded in humanity, driven by humor, and built on delivering good quality stories.

## The Founders
* Kyle Finnegan: Director and Producer. (Portfolio: https://www.kylefinnegan.com)
* Irem Dogancali: Editor and Producer. (Portfolio: https://www.iremdogancali.com)

## Notable Projects
* Flirty Little Fling: WAMMIE Award-winning music video for DC artist MADDIE (2026). Directed by Irem Dogancali and Kyle Finnegan.
* MSG: Mysterious Savory Grains: Telly Silver Award-winning short documentary about Chef Tim Ma and the stigma of monosodium glutamate. Directed by Kyle Finnegan.
* Ten Thousand Lines: Hairbrained Video Awards Finalist (2025) for precision hair cutting content, featuring Jun Jie Du. Directed by Irem Dogancali.
* Who Cares About Gravitational Waves?: Symbiosis program short documentary supported by LaboCine & Simons Foundation. Directed by Kyle Finnegan and Lieke Von Son.
